author: makortel
body:
#### PR description:

AFAIK unlike `trigger::TriggerEvent` the `trigger::TriggerEventWithRefs` is not part of RAW, and is thus safe to move (and is stored in files in workflow 34434.0.

Resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/2180

#### PR validation:

Code compiles
title: [EVOLUTION_X Move `trigger::TriggerEventWithRefs` to `io_v1` namespace
